description_long: This is a freestanding wooden writing desk with an integrated hutch, featuring a combination of dark and medium brown wood finishes. The upper hutch section includes multiple open shelves and six small drawers, providing organized storage for stationery or small items. The main desk surface is flat and spacious, suitable for writing or placing a laptop, and is finished in a contrasting dark color. The legs are slender and straight, giving the desk a modern yet classic appearance. The back panel of the hutch is solid, with a gentle arch at the top, adding a decorative touch. No visible handles or glass panels are present, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional for use in an office, study, or urban workspace.
description: A freestanding wooden writing desk with a hutch, featuring open shelves, small drawers, and a spacious dark work surface. The design combines modern and classic elements with a solid back panel and slender legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves, six small drawers, and the spacious dark desktop surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the hutch and the thickness of the desk surface and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel with a gentle arch at the top, no visible storage or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the hutch and desk.
